hyperedges.label: Stock adjustment flow: POSView / StockMovementForm call adjust_stock RPC which writes to stock_movements table
Receipt printing chain: POSView / SalesView → ReceiptModal → Receipt (80mm thermal layout) → window.print()
Legacy data migration pipeline: CBS CSV files → import_to_supabase.py normalization → Supabase tables consumed by index.html app
